prompt: In inputs/eval-2-new-entrypoint-cli/ (TypeScript, src/core src/adapters src/run). We trigger a catalog reindex from an HTTP endpoint today. I want to also run the same reindex from a cron job as a CLI command, without duplicating the reindex logic. How should I add that?

assertions.text: Reuses the existing reindexCatalog use-case in core rather than duplicating its logic
Adds the new CLI as an entrypoint under run/ (how it's run)
Wires the same adapters (ProductStore, SearchIndex) into the CLI entrypoint
Keeps the CLI entrypoint thin — no business logic added to run/
Does not introduce a new outward dependency from core to make this work
